message:
fix: unify event logging and align persistence paths

Remove duplicate event logging from SessionController (agent handles it).
Move sessionsDir from sibling of genome to genomePath/sessions.
Point _logPath to genomePath/logs/ to match agent's log path.
Make sessionsDir optional, defaulting to genomePath/sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
